name: ABB Robot Control
description: Unified ABB robot plugin that supports real controllers and virtual viewer workflows.

controllerHost.label: Controller Host
controllerHost.help: ABB controller IP or hostname for real mode.

controllerPort.label: Controller Port
controllerPort.help: ABB controller port for real mode (default: 7000).

defaultRobot.label: Default Robot Profile
defaultRobot.help: Robot profile id used when robot_id is omitted.

defaultMode.label: Default Mode
defaultMode.help: Preferred mode for unified abb_robot tool: real, virtual, or auto.

wsBridgePort.label: WS Bridge Port
wsBridgePort.help: WebSocket bridge port used by virtual mode (default: 9877).

controllerHost.description: ABB robot controller IP address or hostname (real mode)

defaultRobot.description: Default robot configuration ID to use

autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to controller on startup

rapidProgramPath.description: Path on controller to store generated RAPID programs

defaultMode.description: Default operation mode: virtual, real, or auto

wsBridgePort.description: WebSocket bridge port for virtual 3D viewer mode (default: 9877)
